sources.title: 神相全編
sources.traditionalAttribution: 題宋陳摶秘傳，明袁忠徹訂正
sources.witness: 致和堂藏板明刊本（書格所述），以中國哲學書電子化計劃轉錄作檢索見證
sources.repository: 中國哲學書電子化計劃；書格明刊本影像說明

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p14 (displayed text row 13)
excerpts.originalText: 三停者，額門，准頭，地角，此面部三停也，又為三財，又為三主，又名三表，俱要平等。上停長少年忙，中停長福祿昌，下停長老吉祥，三停平等，一生衣祿無虧；若三停尖削，歪斜，粗露，俱不利也，可照流年部位氣色而推，不可一體而斷。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p23 (displayed text row 22)
excerpts.originalText: 宜細嫩隆厚，掌有八卦，紋路鮮明。書云，掌紅撰血，富貴綿綿，手軟如綿，閒且有錢，掌平如鏡，白手興家。紋露粗率，晚年衣祿平常，但相掌訣法有載於後，宜與前後兼觀。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p14 (displayed text row 13)
excerpts.originalText: 左顴為東嶽，額為南嶽，右顴為西嶽，地閣為北嶽，土星為中嶽。書云：五嶽俱朝，貴壓朝班，亦且錢財自旺。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p29 (displayed text row 28)
excerpts.originalText: 五行者：金、木、水、火、土也，書云，金得金剛毅深，木得木資財足，水得水文章貴，火得火見機果，土得土厚豐庫，金形白色喜白，木形瘦喜青，水喜肥黑，火不嫌尖宜赤色，土喜厚今色宜黃，此五形正局也。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p50 (displayed text row 49)
excerpts.originalText: 金形方正色潔白，木形瘦直骨節堅，水形圓厚重而黑，火形豐銳赤焦燥，土形敦厚色黃光。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p308 (displayed text row 307), 十二宮相論
excerpts.originalText: 命宮者，居兩眉之間，山根之上。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p313 (displayed text row 312), 十二宮相論
excerpts.originalText: 鼻乃財星，位居土宿。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p318 (displayed text row 317), 十二宮相論
excerpts.originalText: 兄弟位居兩眉，屬羅計。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p323 (displayed text row 322), 十二宮相論
excerpts.originalText: 田宅者，立居兩眼。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p328 (displayed text row 327), 十二宮相論
excerpts.originalText: 男女者，位居兩眼之下，名曰淚堂。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p333 (displayed text row 332), 十二宮相論
excerpts.originalText: 奴僕者，位居地閣，重接水星。頰圓豐滿，侍立成群。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p338 (displayed text row 337), 十二宮相論
excerpts.originalText: 妻妾者，位居魚尾，號曰奸門。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p343 (displayed text row 342), 十二宮相論
excerpts.originalText: 疾厄者，印堂之下，位居山根。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p348 (displayed text row 347), 十二宮相論
excerpts.originalText: 遷移者，位居眉角，號曰天倉。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p353 (displayed text row 352), 十二宮相論
excerpts.originalText: 官祿者，位居中正，上合離宮。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p358 (displayed text row 357), 十二宮相論
excerpts.originalText: 福德者，位居天倉，牽連地閣。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p363 (displayed text row 362), 十二宮相論
excerpts.originalText: 相貌者，先觀五岳，次辨三停。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p368 (displayed text row 367), 十二宮總訣
excerpts.originalText: 父母宮論曰：日月角須要高。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p12 (displayed text row 11)
excerpts.originalText: 額方者頂起，則為輔佐良臣；額闊者，貴亦堪誇；額塌者，少年虛耗；額低者，刑克愚頑；部位傾陷，髮際參差者，照依刑克兼觀，不可一例而言，有誤相訣。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p318 (displayed text row 317), 兄弟宮
excerpts.originalText: 眉長過目，三四兄弟無刑。眉秀而疏，枝幹自然端正，有如新月。若是短粗，同氣連枝見別。眉環塞眼，雁行必疏。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p700 (displayed text row 699)
excerpts.originalText: 眼中如火主剛強。面上青容冷面主狠癖。眼有三角面肉橫，主剛強。唇高嘴超主性剛。眼白多主性癖。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML rows p605 and p608 (displayed text rows 604 and 607)
excerpts.originalText: 土星是鼻，須要准頭豐厚，兩孔不露，年上壽上平滿直端聳不偏。土宿歪斜受苦辛，准頭尖薄主孤貧，傍觀勾曲如鷹嘴，心裏奸謀必害人。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML rows p48 and p554 (displayed text rows 47 and 553)
excerpts.originalText: 口為出納官：唇紅齒白，兩唇齊豐，人中深長，仰月彎弓，四字口方。口者，心之外表，賞罰之所出，榮辱之所關。欲端而厚，言不亂發，謂之口德。若方廣有棱者，主壽形；如弓稍向上者，主貴；若尖而薄反者，主賤。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p594 (displayed text row 593)
excerpts.originalText: 三才者，額為天，欲闊而圓，名曰有天者貴。鼻為人，欲旺而齊，名曰有人者壽。頦為地，欲方而闊，名曰有地者富。

excerpts.locator: CTP URN ctp:ws905153, HTML row p535 (displayed text row 534)
excerpts.originalText: 夫氣色印堂山根光明者吉，暗慘者滯。年壽黃明者吉，黑病赤官災青破耗白哭泣。准頭黃明者，喜慶立至。黑大病。赤紅者破耗。白者破毒。

sources.title: 神相鐵關刀
sources.traditionalAttribution: 題相術古籍，具體作者與成書年代待版本學核定
sources.witness: 中國哲學書電子化計劃轉錄，卷三相掌秘訣
sources.repository: 中國哲學書電子化計劃

excerpts.locator: HTML row p22 (displayed text row 22), 相掌秘訣
excerpts.originalText: 掌有八卦，而最緊要在巽、離、坤三宮。巽主財帛，離主功名，坤主子嗣。巽為福，離為德，坤為祿，掌心為明堂；宜平宜坳，忌卸忌突，忌暗忌筋。

excerpts.locator: HTML row p23 (displayed text row 23), 相掌秘訣
excerpts.originalText: 指為龍，掌為虎，指長固仕，仍求相配；木形之指乃長，其餘不能盡長也。掌背豐而筋不露，身逸多金；掌心紅而坳不瀉，富足有餘；露筋者勞碌，露節者耗財；掌小者貴，掌大者勞。節過大，主性懶；紋縱橫，主心雜，此掌中之大概也。

excerpts.locator: HTML row p24 (displayed text row 24), 相掌秘訣
excerpts.originalText: 惟掌紋宜深秀，深者現秀不粗；直紋多，人必聰明；橫紋多，人必心紛；指節多橫紋主清貴，直紋主清靈。掌宜配面，掌又宜配身。

sources.title: 許負相法
sources.witness: 《夷門廣牘》本；維基文庫轉錄與中國哲學書電子化計劃轉錄
sources.repository: 維基文庫；中國哲學書電子化計劃

excerpts.locator: 相手篇第十一, Wikisource revision 2300283
excerpts.originalText: 掌四方，厚中央。薄兼有深，法益仕宦，財食安樂。

excerpts.locator: 序, CText chapter 897562 displayed text row 5
excerpts.originalText: 余誦其文，雖多後世增色，而古樸簡要，非漢代莫有也。

sources.title: 公篤相法
sources.witness: 中國哲學書電子化計劃轉錄，上篇卷一手掌圖說
sources.repository: 中國哲學書電子化計劃

excerpts.locator: HTML row p19 (displayed text row 18), 手掌圖說
excerpts.originalText: 餘於手掌相法，經驗甚少。乃枝葉小法。茲姑志之。大抵木形宜長直。金形宜方正。水形宜圓短。土形宜敦厚。火形宜尖露。其它末敢必其為貴賤也。

sources.title: 神相全編卷之八
sources.traditionalAttribution: 題宋陳摶秘傳，明袁忠徹訂正
sources.witness: 識典古籍轉錄，卷八；與致和堂藏板明刊本的逐頁對勘待完成
sources.repository: 識典古籍；書格明刊本影像說明

excerpts.locator: 卷八·論掌紋, chapter 1k2ktfsne0nbv, pages 737-739, lines 330-332
excerpts.originalText: 掌上三紋者，上畫應天，象君象父，定其貴賤也；中畫應人，象賢象愚，辨其貧富也；下畫應地，象臣象母，主有壽夭也。三紋瑩淨，無紋破者，福祿之相也。

excerpts.locator: 卷八·相三才, chapter 1k2ktfss8qdqi, page 760, lines 623-628
excerpts.originalText: 三才紋者，乃掌中三大紋也。自上至下，第一紋居火，為天紋，主根基；第二紋居土，為地紋，主財祿；第三紋居明堂，為人紋，主福德。

excerpts.locator: 卷八·論手, chapter 1k2ktfsndzy1n, pages 709-711
excerpts.originalText: 指纖而長者，聰俊；指短而突者，愚賤。指柔而密者，蓄積；指硬而疏者，破敗。

sources.title: Indian Palmistry: The Lines
sources.traditionalAttribution: Mrs. J. B. Dale (Helena Fenwick Dale)

excerpts.locator: The Lines, opening numbered list, items 6 and 8
excerpts.originalText: The Sun line, called for clearness Via Solis, is a right line which begins at the mount of Apollo and stretches into the hollow of the hand after curving towards the mount of the Moon. The line of Fortune or Saturn begins at the wrist lines, extends through the hollow of the hand to the mount of the middle finger.

excerpts.locator: The Lines, opening numbered list item 2 and section The Liver Line
excerpts.originalText: The Liver or natural mean runs straight through the middle of the hand. The Liver Line. This line being straight and not dissected by obscure little lines, denotes a healthy body.

sources.title: 1911 Encyclopaedia Britannica: Palmistry
sources.witness: 1911 Encyclopaedia Britannica public-domain text on Wikisource

excerpts.locator: Palmistry, paragraph beginning 'These lines isolate certain swellings or monticuli'
excerpts.originalText: The ball of the thumb is called the mountain of Venus; the base of the index finger the mountain of Jupiter; the root of the middle finger the mountain of Saturn; the bases of ring and little finger the mountains of the Sun and Mercury. Above the mountain of Mercury, and between the lines of head and heart is the mountain of Mars, and above the line of heart the mountain of the Moon.
